captured_from: EmmaLeonhart/Yantra repo, site/ (the only directory deployed to yantraos.org via .github/workflows/pages.yml)

rebrand.method: path-preserving JS redirect (redirect/index.html + redirect/404.html) — yantraos.org/<path> -> noldor.tech/<path>
rebrand.mechanism: TIME-BASED in .github/workflows/pages.yml: a daily-scheduled build deploys site/ before the cutover date and redirect/ on or after it. No PR merge, no session cron. (The earlier PR #1 + 3pm local cron were superseded 2026-06-16.)

note: yantraos.org is a single-page landing site. The 'pages' below are everything actually served at the apex domain; in-page section anchors are part of '/' (not separate URLs). After cutover every path 301-equivalents to the same path on noldor.tech, so nothing 404s.
